[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010011101 5
1 0000001010 2
2 1111101000 6
3 0110001111 6
4 1011101100 6
5 0011111111 8
6 0010111101 6
7 1111010000 5

01 0000011111 5
12 1111111000 7
23 0110011111 7
34 1111101100 7
45 1111111111 a
56 0010111111 7
67 1111110000 6
70 1111111111 a

02 1001111010 6
13 1111111011 9
24 1110001111 7
35 1111101110 8
46 0011111111 8 match 5
57 1010111101 7
60 1111110101 8
71 0111011111 8

03 0100011011 5
14 1111101000 6 match 2
25 1111001111 8
36 1011101111 8
47 1011111111 9
50 1111111101 9
61 1111010111 8
72 1111111111 a

04 1100001010 4
15 1111101010 7
26 0110101111 7
37 1011101100 6 match 4
40 1111111111 a
51 0010111111 7
62 1111110000 6
73 0111011111 8

05 1101001010 5
